You may report workplace matters, safety: You may report workplace matters, safety risks, ethics concerns, suspected misconduct, or ideas for improvement.

Use only Latin letters and numbers.
From 3 to 8 digits in the running number: From 3 to 8 digits in the running number.
When enabled, AI checks whether a submis: When enabled, AI checks whether a submission matches the purpose of the Speak Up channel before registration.
Describe which submissions should be acc: Describe which submissions should be accepted and which should be rejected.
AI receives only the category, subject,: AI receives only the category, subject, and description. Contact details and attachments are not sent for screening.
Only a clear mismatch with high AI confi: Only a clear mismatch with high AI confidence is rejected. Uncertain submissions are accepted for human review.
If AI is unavailable or returns an inval: If AI is unavailable or returns an invalid result, the inquiry is accepted instead of being lost.
Do not use screening to suppress critici: Do not use screening to suppress criticism or reports about management. Criteria should only exclude clearly irrelevant submissions and spam.
The information provided does not fall w: The information provided does not fall within the scope of matters handled through the Speak Up channel and cannot be registered as an inquiry in this system. For guidance or referral to the appropriate service, please contact :email.
Checking whether the inquiry can be acce: Checking whether the inquiry can be accepted…
The message is being checked against the: The message is being checked against the Speak Up admission criteria. This usually takes a few seconds.
The inquiry has been accepted and will b: The inquiry has been accepted and will be reviewed by authorized employees.
If your message concerns company activit: If your message concerns company activities, misconduct, safety, ethics, or another Speak Up matter, clarify the relevant facts and submit it again.
Too many status checks. Please try again: Too many status checks. Please try again in a minute.
